creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
All dependent ports have been tested successfully on 12.1-RELEASE except:
- net-mgmt/netxms: it is broken on 12.1, hence I tested it on 11.3-RELEASE, successfully;
-  sysutils/tmate-slave: the port is broken on all supported FreeBSD versions.

The update is then ready to be commited.
